title: Replace site logo with uploaded ONEDOT DIGITAL brand image

requirements.text: Replace the current logo image used in the TopNav, HeroSection, and Footer with the newly generated ONEDOT DIGITAL logo asset (onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png) stored in frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: Apply the change with this same image in the draft

acceptanceCriteria: The ONEDOT DIGITAL logo (dark navy 'ONEDOT' with blue circle accent on the 'O' in DOT, and grey 'DIGITAL' below) is visible in the top navigation bar.
The same logo appears in the HeroSection.
The same logo appears in the Footer.
No broken image placeholders or old logo references remain anywhere on the page.
The logo image is loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated/onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png.

constraints: Do not alter any layout, color scheme, or other visual elements beyond swapping the logo image.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing typography, color tokens, or animations.

required: ONEDOT DIGITAL wordmark logo on a transparent background: bold dark navy uppercase 'ONEDOT' text where the 'O' in DOT is replaced by a blue circle ring accent, with 'DIGITAL' in medium-weight grey beneath it (onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png)
